checks.feature: surface texture or helical thread pattern visible (check isometric view)
checks.notes: Vertical striations visible on the central cylindrical column in both front and isometric views, consistent with a threaded insert representation

checks.feature: protruding prong/tab features visible (check isometric view)
checks.notes: Three prong-like tab features are visible protruding upward from the top plate in the isometric view, consistent with a 3-prong GoPro clip style
The prong arrangement with gaps between them in the top view and isometric view suggests a clip/snap interface typical of GoPro finger mounts
A central threaded cylindrical boss is visible extending downward from the base plate in the front view, consistent with a 1/4-20 thread insert at the bottom

issues: Isometric rendering is visually cluttered with overlapping transparent geometry making it difficult to clearly distinguish individual features
The 3-prong geometry in the isometric view appears somewhat irregular or asymmetric - prongs look like sharp wedge shapes rather than clean rectangular tabs
Overall height appears to span approximately from Z=-20 to Z=20 (40mm range) in the front view, which may exceed the specified 25mm height
The bottom threaded insert protrudes significantly below the base in the front view, geometry proportions may not match typical GoPro adapter dimensions
